name: Oversized Blocked Woven Square Throw Pillow - Threshold™
description:
Give your home a sleek and modern look with the Oversized Woven Square Pillow from Threshold™. The woven blocked pattern of this pillow provides a unique touch of texture and bold design, while the neutral colors are still subtle enough to combine and highlight other accent pieces in your space. Combine with wood tones and warm toned colors for an ambiance that is both interesting and comforting, or pair with metal tones and eclectic accent pieces for a space that is elegant, interesting and as unique as you. The cushioned design also helps add coziness and comfort to any space in your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
